objective: Confirm the official evaluation metric for BirdCLEF 2026. The current working assumption is ROC-AUC, inferred from submission format and BirdCLEF 2024-2025 precedent. Find direct evidence.
success_criteria: Return the exact metric name as stated on the official competition page or rules.
Provide the source URL and access date.
If the metric cannot be confirmed, state so explicitly and list what was tried.
evidence_requirements: Only claims backed by a directly accessible URL count as confirmation.
Forum posts or discussion threads count as supporting evidence, not confirmation.
If the Kaggle overview page is JS-rendered and unreadable, try: Kaggle API, competition rules tab, evaluation tab, forum pinned posts, or prior-year competition pages that reference 2026.
stop_conditions: If no direct evidence is found after checking all listed sources, return status: unconfirmed.
